name: RARE ELEMENT RESOURCES LTD
summary: Rare Element Resources Ltd. is focused on advancing the Bear Lodge rare earth elements (REE) project in Wyoming, which includes a mineral deposit and a planned commercial processing and separation plant. The company is operating a demonstration-scale REE processing and separation plant funded in part by the U.S. Department of Energy. It also holds a 100% interest in the Sundance Gold Project, currently on hold since 2011.
